name: PRISM: Sensitivity-Aware PolynoMial PRuning for EffIcient Neural Network Encryption
summary: arXiv:2607.18342v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Structured pruning is essential for making neural network inference feasible under homomorphic encryption (HE), yet its impact on model reliability...
description: arXiv:2607.18342v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Structured pruning is essential for making neural network inference feasible under homomorphic encryption (HE), yet its impact on model reliability has remained unexplored. This paper presents a systematic reliability characterization of pruned CKKS-encrypted neural networks and introduces Polynomial-Sensitivity-Aware Pruning (PSAP), a structure...
author: Sahaj Majavdia, Mahdi Taheri
